AI.Title: AI Development
AI.Desc: Leveraging Spec-Driven Development with AI agents for high-velocity delivery under expert architectural supervision.

Backend.Title: Back-end - Java
Backend.Desc: Experience with complex monolithic systems and deep inheritance hierarchies, where mastery of Java is essential.

Frontend.Title: Front-end
Frontend.Desc: Web development enthusiast with solid foundations in HTML, CSS, and Javascript. Using Angular (v12 - v20) as core framework.

Mobility.Title: Mobility & Desktop
Mobility.Desc: Developing cross-platform apps with Capacitor (Android/iOS) and Electron (Windows, macOS, Linux).

Security.Title: Cybersecurity
Security.Desc: Implementing secure Authentication and Authorization using OAuth2 and JWT (JSON Web Tokens).

Seidor.Description: Analysis and development of new functionalities in the Payment Gateway application ecosystem, ensuring compatibility, performance, and alignment with the system architecture. Migration and updating of various applications in the service portfolio, ensuring continuity and operational stability.
Seidor.Stack: Java, J2EE, Jakarta, Apache Tomcat, Oracle, GWT, Vaadin 8 - 14, Android, Flutter, React Native, etc.

SeidorAgriculture.Description: Implementation of new features and refactoring of existing components. Drafting functional and technical documentation (diagrams, interfaces, specifications) to facilitate software development and maintenance.
SeidorAgriculture.Stack: API REST Java Framework jADE, DB2, hibernate, Angular 14 - 21.

Neurobai.Description: Design of software architectures and definition of the most suitable technological stack for each solution, ensuring scalability, maintainability, and performance. Development of VR applications and management portals.
Neurobai.Stack: Java 17, Spring Boot, MongoDB, Docker, Angular 12 - 15, Unity 3D, Virtual Reality.

AxpeSantander.Description: Design and development of a Spring Boot-based microservice for the integration of ITSM and JIRA with existing systems, definition of REST APIs, and data persistence management.
AxpeSantander.Stack: Java, Spring Boot, Microservices, Docker, Api REST, Angular 12.

AxpeJusticia.Description: Development and maintenance of applications in the Justicia.eus ecosystem using Java EE 8 and the Struts 2 framework, ensuring quality, performance, and compatibility.

BSRRV.Description: The BSR-RV virtual reality application was developed with the Unity graphics engine. The use of design patterns and the application of SOLID principles made possible a scalable application with a smooth user experience.

Projects.Title: Projects Portfolio
Projects.Intro: Here you can find some of the products I build, focusing on scalability and user experience.

Footer.BuildTogetherText: I'm working for ambitious brands and people, willing to unlock the most powerful features of each technology. Always open to new projects, if you want to work with me and join my quest to excellence don't doubt to contact me!
Footer.FeaturedDesc: Virtual Reality in Unity with Meta Quest 2
Footer.Quote: I may not be where I want to be, but I'm not where I was
Footer.Name: David Ramos Perdomo
